title: LightSirius
description: Lightweight, fast, and efficient anti-cheat solution with expandable features for enhanced security.
body:
# LightSirius

LightSirius Anti-Cheat is currently available for use with only the "noweb check" feature. For now, this feature can be used for free. In the future, I might add more checks to the free version. Additionally, perhaps in the coming days, I could release a paid version and include more control mechanisms. **LightSirius has been coded to be lightweight and fast.**

**If you have any errors or suggestions, you can report them through our Discord server.**

#


<details>
<summary>Checks</summary>
Noweb
</details>
